text: Long stop date extended to 29 May, pending FCA approval
Court sanctions scheme - last day of trading will be 31 March
Helios declined to give an irrevocable undertaking to StoneX's indicative offer, making it "not deliverable".
PUSU Deadline extended to 17 April. Talks with Advent are ongoing.
Viaro (offeror) has acquired 3.19% on market, latest at 3.4822p (offer is 7.46p).
